category_title: Eagerly participating students who raise hands and respond during group vocabulary lessons
scenario_title: Passive engagement during academic activities in small groups
minimal_context: The student is sitting with peers in a small table group and is expected to write about a picture on a worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is the worksheet. Please look at the picture and write about it.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits quietly at the table group, looking at the worksheet but not picking up the iPad to take notes.)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Remains passively engaged, watching the other classmates in the small group instead of working.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying, you need to fill in your responses.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues to show passive engagement, sitting silently without using the iPad or label maker to fill in responses on the worksheet.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is the worksheet. Please look at the picture and write about it.

STUDENT: (Sits quietly at the table group, looking at the worksheet but not picking up the iPad to take notes.)

TUTOR: Go ahead and start writing.

STUDENT: (Remains passively engaged, watching the other classmates in the small group instead of working.)

TUTOR: Keep trying, you need to fill in your responses.

STUDENT: (Continues to show passive engagement, sitting silently without using the iPad or label maker to fill in responses on the worksheet.)

task.content: working on a worksheet, writing about a picture, taking notes, or reading a book
task.learning_goal: address a variety of Individualized Education Program (IEP) goals in an inclusive setting

context.materials: worksheet, iPad, label maker, magnifying device, books at lower readability levels, large fonts with supporting pictures, word banks, speech-generating devices
context.social_setting: working with peers in small table groups

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: During the majority of these classroom observations

behavior_patterns.condition: During the majority of these classroom observations
